sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 컴캐스트 1분기 매출 5.3% 증가, 조정 EBITDA 79억 달러·잉여현금흐름 39억 달러 달성

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 314억 5,700만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 5.3% 증가했으며, 조정 EBITDA는 79억 달러를 기록했습니다.
조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.79달러, 잉여현금흐름은 39억 달러였으며, 주주에게 25억 달러를 환원했습니다.
브로드밴드 가입자 순감이 전년 동기 대비 개선되며 사업 전환의 초기 긍정적 신호가 나타났다고 경영진은 밝혔습니다.

riskChanges.text: 브로드밴드 가입자 이탈이 지속되고 있어 피벗 전략의 실행력 확인이 필요합니다.

businessChanges.text: 커넥티비티 부문 매출이 116억 달러로 증가했으며, 무선 회선은 970만 회선에 도달해 국내 가정용 브로드밴드 고객의 16% 침투율을 달성했습니다.
비즈니스 서비스 커넥티비티 매출은 26억 달러로 5.8% 증가, EBITDA는 15억 달러로 3.8% 증가하며 EBITDA 마진 55.9%를 기록했습니다.
밀라노 코르티나 동계올림픽과 슈퍼볼 등 '레전더리 2월' 이벤트로 2억 2,500만 명 이상의 미국인에게 도달하며 미디어 부문 시청 기록을 경신했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA는 79억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 39억 달러로 규율 있는 자본배분을 유지했습니다.
주주환원은 배당금 12억 달러와 자사주 매입 13억 달러를 합쳐 총 25억 달러였습니다.
순이익은 2,174달러(백만 기준)로 전년 동기 3,375달러(백만 기준) 대비 감소했습니다.
조정 EPS 0.79달러는 전년 동기 1.09달러 대비 하락했습니다.

watchItems.text: 브로드밴드 가입자 손실 개선세가 향후 분기에도 지속될지, 피벗 전략의 실질적 효과가 핵심 관전 포인트입니다.
무선 회선 970만 회선 달성과 함께 브로드밴드-무선 융합 침투율(현 16%) 추가 상승 여부가 중장기 성장 지표로 주목됩니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ex991-3312026.htm EX-99.1 Document PRESS RELEASE COMCAST REPORTS 1st QUARTER 2026 RESULTS PHILADELPHIA - April 23, 2026… Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ: CMCSA) today reported results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. “ 2026 is an important year of execution, and we're seeing tangible early signs our pivot is taking hold, " said Brian L. Roberts and Mike Cavanagh, co-CEOs of Comcast Corporation. " Broadband subscriber losses improved by more than 100,000 year-over-year, and we delivered record wireless line additions as customers respond to simpler, more transparent offers and a better end-to-end experience. Legendary February showcased the strength of our Media portfolio, leveraging the unmatched reach of the Milan Cortina Winter Olympics and the Super Bowl to drive record advertising and strong Peacock growth, while also powering our ability to market our connectivity

at scale. Importantly, we generated $3.9 billion in free cash flow and returned $2.5 billion to shareholders this quarter even as we continued to lean into investments across our core growth businesses, underscoring our disciplined approach to capital allocation. " ($ in millions, except per share data) 1st Quarter Consolidated Results 2026 2025 Change Revenue $31,457 $29,887 5.3 % Pro Forma Revenue 1 $31,457 $28,369 10.9 % Net Income Attributable to Comcast $2,174 $3,375 (35.6 %) Adjusted Net Income 2 $2,863 $4,132 (30.7 %) Adjusted  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.9 billion = 39억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $2,174 = 2,174달러; $3,375 = 3,375달러; $2,863 = 2,863달러; $4,132 = 4,132달러; $9,532 = 9,532달러; $1.09 = 1.09달러; 31,457 million = 314억 5,700만 달러; 2,863 million = 28억 6,300만 달러; 6,891 million = 68억 9,100만 달러; 9,532 million = 95억 3,200만 달러; 8,692 million = 86억 9,200만 달러; 8,294 million = 82억 9,400만 달러; 3,901 million = 39억 100만 달러; 5,421 million = 54억 2,100만 달러.

expenditures, and free cash flow, please refer to the trending schedule on Comcast’s Investor Relations website at www.cmcsa.com. 1st Quarter 2026 Highlights: • Generated Consolidated Adjusted EBITDA of $7.9 Billion, Adjusted EPS of $0.79 and Free Cash Flow of $3.9 Billion • Returned $2.5 Billion to Shareholders Through a Combination of $1.2 Billion in Dividend Payments and $1.3 Billion in Share Repurchases • At Connectivity & Platforms, Connectivity Revenue Increased 1.6% to $11.6 Billion, Primarily Reflecting Growth in Domestic Wireless Equipment, Business Services Connectivity, Domestic Wireless Service and International Connectivity • Gained Traction with Our New  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.9 Billion = 79억 달러; $3.9 Billion = 39억 달러; $2.5 Billion = 25억 달러; $1.2 Billion = 12억 달러; $1.3 Billion = 13억 달러; $11.6 Billion = 116억 달러; $7.9 = 7.9달러; $0.79 = 0.79달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; 435,000 million = 4,350억 달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $11.6 = 11.6달러; 117,000 million = 1,170억 달러.

on Record; Total Wireless Lines Increased to 9.7 Million, Reaching 16% Penetration of Domestic Residential Broadband Customers • Business Services Connectivity Revenue Increased 5.8% to $2.6 Billion, EBITDA Increased 3.8% to $1.5 Billion and EBITDA Margin Was 55.9% • “Legendary February” Delivered Record-Setting Viewership, Reaching Over 225 Million Americans with the Milan Cortina Olympics - the Most-Watched Winter Games Since 2014 - Averaging 23.5 Million Viewers; Super Bowl LX - the Most-Watched Show in NBCU's Company History - Averaging 125 Million Viewers and the Second Most-Watched Event of All Time; and the NBA All-Star Game Delivering Its Largest Audience Since 2011 1 • Peacock Delivered Strong Growth with  Normalized numeric aliases: 9.7 Million = 970만 달러; $2.6 Billion = 26억 달러; $1.5 Billion = 15억 달러; 225 Million = 2억 2,500만 달러; 23.5 Million = 2,350만 달러; 125 Million = 1억 2,500만 달러; 46 Million = 4,600만 달러; $2 Billion = 20억 달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러; $2 = 2달러; $551 = 551달러.
